name: Entity Velocity
desc: Sets an entity's velocity (e.g., from knockback, explosion, piston push).
notes: Velocities are encoded as (value * 8000). Real velocity = encoded / 8000.

modules.name: Velocity
modules.purpose: Cancel or scale velocity. Most common anti-knockback implementation. Cancel entirely (100% antiKB) or scale motionX/Y/Z by percentage. Backtrack buffers S12 for delayed processing.

modules.name: AntiKnockback
modules.purpose: Cancel or scale velocity. Most common anti-knockback implementation. Cancel entirely (100% antiKB) or scale motionX/Y/Z by percentage. Backtrack buffers S12 for delayed processing.

modules.name: Backtrack
modules.purpose: Cancel or scale velocity. Most common anti-knockback implementation. Cancel entirely (100% antiKB) or scale motionX/Y/Z by percentage. Backtrack buffers S12 for delayed processing.
